command:
You are one Codex implementation worker inside a Claude-managed delivery loop.

Project root: /Users/fqyuki/Documents/kd_2026/自学内容/代码类/ashare-phase1-agents-v2
Run directory: /Users/fqyuki/Documents/kd_2026/自学内容/代码类/ashare-phase1-agents-v2/data/output/codex_delegate/2026-03-26_101539
Iteration: 1
Business task: Audit README.md and STARTUP_README.md for consistency. Only edit files if you find a concrete inconsistency. Keep changes minimal. Return pass only if the docs are aligned.

Global plan:
{
  "outcome": "Audit README.md and STARTUP_README.md for factual consistency against each other and the current repo entrypoints; make no edit unless a concrete mismatch is confirmed, and only pass if the two docs remain aligned after the check.",
  "done_means": [
    "README.md and STARTUP_README.md have been compared for overlapping claims about user entrypoints, commands, APIs, and current-build features.",
    "Any overlapping doc claim that is changed is verified against the actual repo implementation or script presence before editing.",
    "If a concrete inconsistency is found, the fix is minimal and limited to the stale doc text in README.md and/or STARTUP_README.md.",
    "If no concrete inconsistency is found, no files are edited and the result clearly states that the docs are aligned.",
    "Non-goal: expanding either document for completeness beyond resolving a proven inconsistency."
  ],
  "review_checks": [
    "Read README.md and STARTUP_README.md side by side and enumerate overlapping claims only.",
    "Verify mentioned scripts and CLI/API names against src/ashare_harness_v2/cli.py, scripts/, and any directly relevant implementation files.",
    "If edits were made, inspect git diff for README.md and STARTUP_README.md to confirm the patch is minimal and limited to the inconsistency.",
    "Reviewer pass condition: either no diff with a justified alignment note, or a minimal diff that resolves a concrete mismatch without introducing new claims."
  ],
  "risks": [
    "README.md is intentionally a high-level summary while STARTUP_README.md is an operator guide; missing detail alone is not an inconsistency.",
    "Date-stamped examples in STARTUP_README.md may look stale but are not automatically inconsistent unless they contradict README.md or current commands/APIs.",
    "Docs may reference shell scripts while implementation also exposes CLI subcommands; that is acceptable if both paths are valid."
  ],
  "all_packets": [
    "wp1"
  ]
}

Your assigned packet:
{
  "packet_id": "wp1",
  "title": "Audit And Minimal Doc Fix",
  "objective": "Compare the two docs on shared claims, verify those claims against the repo, and apply the smallest possible doc correction only if a concrete inconsistency is proven.",
  "scope": [
    "Audit overlapping claims in README.md and STARTUP_README.md.",
    "Verify command, script, and API references against scripts/ and src/ashare_harness_v2/cli.py.",
    "Edit only README.md and/or STARTUP_README.md if needed.",
    "Do not broaden or rewrite either document."
  ],
  "files": [
    "/Users/fqyuki/Documents/kd_2026/自学内容/代码类/ashare-phase1-agents-v2/README.md",
    "/Users/fqyuki/Documents/kd_2026/自学内容/代码类/ashare-phase1-agents-v2/STARTUP_README.md",
    "/Users/fqyuki/Documents/kd_2026/自学内容/代码类/ashare-phase1-agents-v2/src/ashare_harness_v2/cli.py",
    "/Users/fqyuki/Documents/kd_2026/自学内容/代码类/ashare-phase1-agents-v2/scripts"
  ],
  "commands": [
    "sed -n '1,220p' README.md",
    "sed -n '1,260p' STARTUP_README.md",
    "rg -n \"ask-stock|discover-ideas|delegate-codex|serve_api|serve_dashboard|run_trading_day|run_realtime_session|run_post_close|GET /api/(status|homepage|advice|discovery)\" -S README.md STARTUP_README.md src scripts",
    "git diff -- README.md STARTUP_README.md"
  ],
  "deliverables": [
    "A short pass/fail audit note listing any concrete inconsistency found, or explicitly stating no inconsistency was found.",
    "If needed, a minimal patch touching only README.md and/or STARTUP_README.md.",
    "Verification evidence tying each changed claim to an existing script, CLI command, or API implementation."
  ]
}

Execution rules:
- Stay inside your assigned scope.
- Do not take ownership of other packets.
- Make the smallest coherent code change that satisfies the packet.
- Run the most relevant scoped checks you can.
- If blocked, say so explicitly with evidence.
- Return valid JSON only matching the schema.
- Do not include markdown fences.

You are not the final reviewer. Do not claim the whole task is done.
